title:
.envはAI以前の時代から.gitignoreに記述するのはマスト。例えプライベートリポジトリだろうと。

しかもdenyリストでも防げない。

今のAI、Claude Opus 4.7はローカルに.envをキーチェーンに入れても抜き取るんだから、

そもそも.env系をローカルに置くな。
クラウドに置こう。

title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
content: Tesla is expanding its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston, according to a social media post from the company. The post says simply that “Robotaxi is now rolling out in Dallas & Houston 🤠” and includes a 14-second video showing Tesla vehicles driving without human monitors or drivers in the front seat. The company now […]

content: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

title: The RAM shortage could last years
content: According to Nikkei Asia, even as suppliers ramp up DRAM production, manufacturers are only expected to meet 60 percent of demand by the end of 2027.
